Help & Support
Get the most out of Apex Revenue
Quick Start
⚡
Live Tab
Monitor real-time stats, whale activity, and get AI-powered monetization prompts during your stream.
🐋
Whale Tracker
Whales are your top-spending viewers. Track when they join and leave so you can time your best offers.
📊
Analytics
View tip activity over time, peak viewer moments, and session totals — all from your current stream.
💜
Fan Leaderboard
All tippers ranked by session volume. Filter by In Room, Top Tippers, or New fans.
Badge Legend
🐋 WhaleTop spender, above your whale threshold
🥇 GoldElite tier tipper ($200+)
🥈 SilverMid-tier regular ($50–$199)
🥉 BronzeEntry-tier supporter ($10–$49)
🔁 LoyalReturning across sessions
✨ NewFirst session tipper
↩ LeftNo longer in the room
💡 Suggest a Feature
Have an idea that would make Apex Revenue better? We build based on creator feedback.
💰 Monetization
📊 Analytics
💜 Fans
🎨 UI/UX
✨ Other
